feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MAINTENANCE RESOURCE SCHEDULING - AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING
entry.content:
LIST OF WORK ORDERS AVAILABLE FOR NEXT 4 WEEKS

1)

2)

RESPECTIVE WORK CENTERS AVAILABLE CAPACITY AND CAPACITY LOAD FOR ABOVE OPERATIONS .

CREATING A NEW SCHEDULE

SCHEDULING VIEW AFTER CREATION OF SCHEDULE

WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE IN RESPECTIVE SCHEDULE

DOING SCHEDULE AUTOMATICALLY

AFTER AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERATION STATUS

IN ABOVE 4000542/0020 WAS NOT SCHEDULED AND GIVEN MSG IS BELOW

I COULD UNDERSTAND DUE TO THIS OPERATION WENT TO DUE 400542/0030 WAS NOT SCHEDULED.

SAME MESSAGE WAS GENERATED FOR 4000543/0030, 4000544/0010 ALSO.

AFTER SCHEDULING WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE:

UTILIZING PERCENTAGE WAS NOT ABOVE 100 BUT OPERATION WAS NOT SCHEUDLED. AS PER MY UNDERSTANDING IN AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERARATION CAN SCHEDULE WITHIN SCHEDULING DAYS(5 TO 11). SO OPERATION SHOULD HAVE BEEN SCHEDULED ON 6TH,7TH,8TH (9TH AND 10TH NON-WORKING DAYS). BUT IT THROWS ERROR.

KINDLY HELP ON THIS, PLS EXPLAIN WHY APPLICATION BEHAVE IN THIS WAY.

DRRTT3 WORK CETNER CAPACITY VIEW

IF IAM WRONG PLS EXPLAIN THE AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING IN DETAILED WAY. 

ALREADY I WALKED THROUGH SAP MAUALS. I COULDN'T FIGURE OUT THE REASON FOR THIS BEHAVIOUR.

entry.title: Equipment master partner data mass update
entry.content:
IE05: Equipment master partner mass update not available.

LSMW Direct Input Method: We are unable to update equipment partner data as counter field don't exist in target structure.
LSMW Recording:  I maintained counter field both in source and target structure. LSMW not working as expected due to counter field does not exist in Dynpro SAPLIPAR 0200.

I don't want to use functional module PM_PARTNER_UPDATE as it is directly updating data in table IHPA.

I tried with functional module ALM_ME_PARTNER_MAINTAIN, BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT and unable to update partner data(I checked where used list of functional module and it is not used anywhere in SAP).

I also checked all BAPIs related to equipment but did not find any useful one.

Kindly help me on how to proceed further. Thank you.

entry.title: Unable to edit Transport field in SOBJ
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Transaction SOBJ we were unable to modify Transport field. We need to change the Transport field to "No Transport" it is greyed out and by default coming as "Automatic Transport". Can you please help us on this?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: R2/AM-ISP/Build-System Status is not NOCO but Success Message pop-up is appearing as completed Sav
entry.content:
When setting any Notification to complete the NOCO is not successful because of failures in the custom validations which are done in the SAP provided customer exit EXIT_SAPLIQS0_001 include ZXWOCU10.

Even though the NOCO is not set the standard class CL_EAMS_BO_NOTIF, method SAVE adds a success message without checking the Notification NOCO status.

Can you help?

Thanks

entry.title: remove customizing from OABC
entry.content:
hi,

we did some customizing for depreciation area for investment measures by accident in OABC. But we cannot remove it by error AC528. setting it to warning in OBA5 doesn't help.

How can we remove the wrong customizing?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Issue with Fiori Search Help after Activating Alternative Labels for Functional Locations
entry.content:
Hello,

Since activating the alternative label for functional locations, some Fiori search helps are not working as expected.

The tables IFLOT and IFLOS contain the functional location data.

The key with the question mark and number is currently being used in the WDAs EAMS_WDA_MPLAN_OIF_V2 and EAMS_WDA_TL_OIF_V2 (Fiori Search Help).

However, in transaction tiles such as IW31 or in GUI with transaction IA01, the external key is correctly used.


What can we do to ensure the external key is used in the WDAs as well?

 

S4CORE 107 / UIS4HOP1 800

entry.title: Auto update fiscal year in FB03 to current year
entry.content:
Hello,

Whenever I open FB03 the fiscal year is always 2022. Is there a way to set SAP up so that it auto updates to the currently year. If so how do I do this. I here is a screenshot as an example. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: "No personal master record exists for person 0" occurs in APP Perform Maintenance Jobs - SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I click on "Assign to Me" after selecting an operation in the "Perform Maintenance Job" Fiori app, I receive the following error:

"No personal master record exists for person 0"

However, please note the following:

I have a personnel number maintained for myself in PA30.

A corresponding Business Partner (BP) is also created.

My personnel number is correctly assigned to the work center associated with the operation.

Could you please advise what might be causing this error, or if there is any missing link (e.g., HR integration, user ID assignment, or infotype setup) that I should check?

and Is there any method to confirm without assign the operation to employee?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: The rejection code needs to be updated at the notification level
entry.content:
The user has requested the following requirement:

  • The Work Order is in TECO status, and the respective Notification is in Complete (NOCO) status.

  • In this scenario, when the user updates the Rejection Status Code at the operation level, the same code should also be updated at the notification level.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Planning board for Service Order (IW32) via BAPI
entry.content:
We need to automate the scheduling of service orders in SAP using a BAPI instead of manually updating the start and end dates in transaction IW32. The goal is to programmatically set or update the basic start date/time and basic end date/time for a given service order using an appropriate BAPI (CM25) planning board.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create a Billable Maintenance Orders in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi, I have a requirement from a new client that is planning to move from ecc to S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. Their current process involved a creation of maintenance order first and then the sales order so that they could bill the customer. I am struggling to find a similar process in cloud edition and would like experts help on this.

Please let me know if theres a solution processes currently available that is relevant for this process. If not please let me know how to do this process in cloud edition.

Thank you.

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE GI for Reservation (261) Mat Doc is created but withdrawn quantity is 0
entry.content:
Hello Colleagues,

When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE Goods Issue for Reservation (261) Material Document is created but Withdrawn Quantity is 0. It happens only sporadically. The quantity is available in stock.

entry.title: Allow change in Notification Type after created
entry.content:
Hi

I want to change the notification type (Breakdown to predictive maintenance ) by Notification change T code IW 22.
After doing the following configuration it is not working .

IMG-->Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-->Maintenance and Service Processing-->Maintenance and Service Notifications-->Notification Creation-->Notification Types-->Allowed Change of Notification Type

Please advise to resolve it.

entry.title: Data Definition for Functional Location Master Data
entry.content:
Hi, I am creating a data definition document for Functional Location Master data to identify fields which are required to populate the data as part of migration from ECC to S/4 HANA. I need support on below queries:

1. How to identify total number of tables applicable for functional location

2. How to identify which tables and which fields in those tables feed data to Functional Location T-code IL01

3. Mapping of the tables 

4. Out of those fields which one are mandatory, optional and display

5. Which of these fields need configuration and which do not. 

Is there a way or T-code apart from SE16N which I can leverage for these tasks. Please share any SAP links or best practices on data mapping documen from ECC to S4 HANA for master data elements.

entry.title: Restriction of permissions for notifications with code group "OP-Change" in transactions IW21, IW22
entry.content:
1. Introduction
As part of the internal change management process at Schluchseewerk in the context of S/4HANA, the functionality "Notifications" in the SAP module EAM is utilized. For the operational implementation of this process, we have planned the use of OP notifications. A permission concept has been created for these and partially implemented technically.

During the implementation, an individual role Z_EAM_NOTIFICATION_OP was created, tailored to specific permissions within the notification processing framework.

2. Justification
To ensure a clean and controlled change management process, it is imperative that only authorized users with specific roles have access to OP notifications. In particular, it must be prevented that users without the appropriate authorization can:
- create (transaction IW21),
- View (transaction IW23), or
- change (transaction IW22) OP notifications with the code group (QMGRP) "OP-Change."

Adhering to this restriction is central to quality assurance, traceability of changes, and minimizing potential errors in the change management process.

3. Objective
The goal is to adjust the permissions in SAP so that notifications with the code group OP-Change can only be created, viewed, or changed by authorized individuals. For users with the appropriate permissions for the role, the following restrictions should apply:
- The code group OP-Change should not be visible in the catalog selection,
- it should not be used for creating notifications,
- existing notifications of this group should neither be displayed nor edited unless the user has the appropriate permissions.

4. Technical Issue
In the course of the previous permission check, the authorization object Q_GP_CODE – Use of group codes was already employed. This made it possible to hide the code group OP-Change in the catalog selection and thus prevent the creation of corresponding notifications. However, it remains technically possible to display or change notifications of this code group via IW22 and IW23.

When an OP notification with the coding OP-ART is opened and the user attempts to manually enter the value into the OP-CHANGE field (since the code group OP-Change is already hidden in the catalog selection), the following error message still occurs: When saving in IW22, the system only accesses the authorization object I_QMEL – PM/QM: Notification types, which does not allow restriction at the code group level.

Thus, there is currently a lack of a permission check that ensures at the code group level that notifications with the group "OP-Change" can only be displayed or changed by authorized users.

5. Expectation / Next Steps
We request an examination of how permission control at the code group level for the mentioned transactions can be implemented – either through a suitable combination of existing authorization objects or through alternative technical measures (e.g., user exits, BAdIs, etc.).

The goal is a clean and audit-proof implementation of the requirement to restrict the editing and visibility of "OP-Change" notifications to the defined roles.

entry.title: Pl Deliver time time option in external service PR not working in work order
entry.content:
Pl Deliver time time option in external service PR not working . 

i am trying understand Pl Deliver time how to activate there is any configuration based on control key . 

When we create an external PR from a work order, there's a field called "Planned Delivery Time". Ideally, we should be able to mention the number of days there, and based on that, the delivery date should be updated in the Purchase requi. 

please help for this looking solution 

ex. today date PR creation date 14.5.2025 , if we enter 4 in PL deliv. time then PR delivery date will update as 18.05.2025

entry.title: Alphanumeric number ranges for Equipment in Plant Maintenance
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
I have huge dump of equipment's, either of them is available or lost as it was created long back ago.

I want to recount them and creates new equipment number, which requires Alpha numeric number ranges.

Ex. AB00000 to AB99999.

Because when I will plan for order or plan, I will sure that this has been created recently and I have to use it.

While I am searching an equipment I found a lot of equipment which is not important to me so I will select recently created with Alpha numeric number series.

Please give me you opinion

entry.title: Shift Factor Behavior When Only Early Completion Is Defined
entry.content:
Let’s say I have a strategy-based maintenance plan with the following settings:

  • Cycle = 10 days

  • Shift factor for early completion = 100%

  • Shift factor for late completion = (left blank)

  • Tolerance = 0% (so any variance will trigger a shift)

📅 The order was completed 5 days late.

Now I’m trying to understand how SAP handles the next planned date.

❓Question:

Since only the shift factor for early completion is maintained, and the order was completed late, will SAP apply the 100% early shift factor to this late completion?

If yes — that would mean:

  • Next plan date is shifted 5 days later (i.e., same effect as if late shift factor = 100%)

If no — then what fallback logic is applied in this case?

📘 What I Know So Far:

  • In IP11, I can define separate shift factors for early and late.

  • But some sources and instructor notes suggest that if only one shift factor is defined, SAP will apply that value for both early and late completions.

  • Others suggest late completions are only shifted if the late shift factor is explicitly defined.

I'm looking for confirmation from anyone who has tested this in a live system or encountered it in certification prep.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EAM Implementation for Healthcare Facilities and Medical Equipment
entry.content:
Hello Everyone ,

I hope you're doing well.

I’m reaching out to gain a better understanding of how to implement Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) in healthcare facilities, particularly for managing medical equipment. I would appreciate it if you could share the key steps and processes typically followed in such implementations.

Thank you in advance for your valuable guidance.

entry.title: Request for Order Settlement Based on GL Account to Different WBS Elements
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to inquire if it's possible to configure an order settlement rule that allows cost settlement based on General Ledger (GL) accounts to different WBS elements. Our business requirement is as follows:

  • Diesel costs (e.g., posted to a specific GL account) should be settled to WBS Element A (e.g., for fuel-related costs).

  • Spare parts costs (posted to another GL account) should be settled to WBS Element B (e.g., for material/repair costs).

In essence, we need to split the settlement of an order based on the cost origin (GL account) so that each type of cost is settled to the correct corresponding WBS element.

We request your guidance on whether this can be achieved via standard SAP functionality, such as:

  • Creating multiple settlement rules with account assignment filters (GL-based)?

  • Using source structures and assignment rules in settlement profiles?

  • Any enhancement/BAdI recommendations, if standard functionality does not support this?

Your assistance on how best to approach and configure this scenario would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.
